title: Frost Enchantments
description: This mod adds the Frost Aspect enchantment that is similar to the vanilla Fire Aspect and Frost Protection (WIP). It uses the already existing freezing effect feature and turns it into a powerfull enchantment.
body:
This mod adds the Frost Aspect enchantment that is similar to the vanilla Fire Aspect. It uses the already existing freezing effect feature and turns it into a powerfull enchantment. Can be obtained by enchanting, traiding or can be found.

The mod also adds the Frost Protection enchantment that can counter the Frost Aspect similarly how the Fire Protection works.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The Frost Aspect enchantment has two levels and is not compatible with Fire Aspect. The level impact the duration of the effect.

Frost Protection has four levels and each level shortens the time that the player is frozen for after attack.
